answers: Pomodoro (25 min work, 5 min break), prioritize tasks, minimize distractions, plan ahead.
Boost productivity: use the Pomodoro technique, time-block your calendar, tackle your hardest task first (eat the frog), and batch similar tasks.
To focus better: put your phone in another room, use website blockers, work in 25-min sprints with short breaks, and have a clear to-do list.
Productivity tip: plan your top 3 tasks the night before, protect your first 2 hours from emails and distractions, and review your day each evening.
